claims.summary: Marker cleanup preserves exact references based on relation and delimiter context and emits bounded receipts.
claims.disposition: Verified the current exact-occurrence, context, aggregation, and content-free receipt pipeline.

claims.summary: Non-word separators or compound relation phrases could cause first_word_after to miss an exact relation.
claims.disposition: Verified first_word_after skips arbitrary non-word separators and the focused suite includes newline-separated exact-relation coverage.

claims.summary: The behaves relation and nested delimiter depth require exact regression coverage.
claims.disposition: Verified the current relation set includes behaves and tests preserve nested marker references through the supported four-level bound.

claims.summary: Marker-list scope and linear longest-match scanning should remain bounded and reviewable.
claims.disposition: Verified the marker set is explicitly scoped, longest raw matches win, and cleanup reports retain removed and preserved counts without prose.
